sections.heading: Cumulative Frequency Curve
sections.content: The cumulative frequency curve is also called the OGIVE. It is the graph of the cumulative frequency against the upper class boundary.

sections.heading: Example
sections.content:
The table below shows the height of 200 people who were randomly picked.
Heights(cm) | 145 - 149 | 150 - 154 | 155 - 159 | 160 - 164 | 165 - 169 | 170 - 174 | 175 - 179
Frequency | 5 | 18 | 50 | 29 | 80 | 14 | 4
Construct for the distribution above, a cumulative frequency curve.

sections.heading: Heights | Frequency | Cumulative Frequency | Upper Class Boundary
